summary: Both sections are present in correct order with accurate text, built on eds-hero-banner markup. However, the 'twice-yearly PrEP is here' line renders black against the dark image (per measurement it should be #000000 but is illegible against the design's white treatment), the CTA arrow is misplaced, and the second banner's content is offset/oversized vs the design, hurting the visual match.

issues.expected: Line 'twice-yearly PrEP is here' shown in white (#FFFFFF) and clearly legible over the dark photo, per design strip 4
issues.actual: Code sets color to #000000 (var(--gs-tertiary_100)), rendering it near-invisible against the dark image
issues.fix: The design shows white text; reconcile with measurement — set to a legible color matching the design strip (white)

issues.actual: Arrow renders at x=462px due to button width/positioning
issues.fix: Adjust button width/arrow position so arrow centre sits near x≈288px

issues.expected: Title block and content positioned per design; CTA and footnote vertically placed to match design strip 4/5
issues.actual: Content block appears lower/larger and overlaps the image differently; render strip 4 shows oversized 'twice-yearly' and shifted vertical rhythm vs design
issues.fix: Tighten line-heights and top offsets to align the title block, CTA and footnote to the design spec positions
Use closer font-size (~25px) matching design measurement

issues.expected: Yellow/gold heading color matching design (#F0E933 approx)
issues.actual: Uses #F0E933 which is acceptable; verify shade matches design gold
issues.fix: Confirm gold hue matches design swatch

layoutFailures.fix: Shift horizontally to x≈288px (check column/alignment classes)

layoutFailures.text: The first-ever twice-yearly PrEP is here
